ast.name: log
ast.source: If randomize option is set to false, then quality option must be 'default' or 'proof'.
ast.target: 如果随机化选项设置为 false，则质量选项必须为 'default' 或 'proof'。

ast.name: log
ast.source: not scaling solution: zero size detected
ast.target: 未缩放解决方案：检测到零尺寸

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: CDN: enter a version or "latest". Bundled: offline, fixed version.
ast.target: CDN：输入版本号或 \"latest\"。捆绑：离线，固定版本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, diagrams follow the active Obsidian theme. When disabled, Mermaid uses its "default" theme.
ast.target: 启用时，图表遵循活动的 Obsidian 主题。禁用时，Mermaid 使用其 \"default\" 主题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Uses ELK as the default layout engine. Produces better results for complex flowcharts and graphs.
ast.target: 使用 ELK 作为默认布局引擎。为复杂流程图和图形产生更好的结果。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Renders diagrams with a sketched, hand-drawn style.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use this plugin's Mermaid for all built-in `mermaid` code blocks across Obsidian, not just `mermaid-next`. Note: enabling this may cause compatibility issues with other plugins that modify Mermaid or rely on Obsidian's built-in Mermaid.
ast.target: 使用此插件的 Mermaid 替换 Obsidian 中所有内置的 `mermaid` 代码块，而不仅仅是 `mermaid-next`。注意：启用此选项可能会导致与其他修改 Mermaid 或依赖 Obsidian 内置 Mermaid 的插件出现兼容性问题。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Warning: KaTeX doesn't work in quirks mode. Make sure your website has a suitable doctype.
ast.target: 警告：KaTeX 在怪异模式下无法工作。请确保您的网站具有合适的文档类型。

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 正在修复并尝试 - 移除 XXX

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Cluster without external connections, without a parent and with children
ast.target: 没有外部连接、没有父节点且有子节点的集群

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 从递归渲染 XAX 返回

ast.name: warn
ast.source: flowchart-elk was moved to an external package in Mermaid v11. Please refer [release notes](https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid/releases/tag/v11.0.0) for more details. This diagram will be rendered using `dagre` layout as a fallback.
ast.target: flowchart-elk 在 Mermaid v11 中已移至外部包。请参阅 [发行说明](https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid/releases/tag/v11.0.0) 了解更多详情。此图表将使用 `dagre` 布局作为后备方案进行渲染。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: The difference between the min and max time is more than 5 years. This will cause performance issues. Skipping drawing exclude days.
ast.target: 最小和最大时间之间的差异超过 5 年。这将导致性能问题。跳过绘制排除日期。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: ⚠️ Invalid or missing stateId from key:
ast.target: ⚠️ 来自键的无效或缺失 stateId：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: ⚠️ Could not find node matching text:
ast.target: ⚠️ 找不到匹配文本的节点：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: ⚠️ Node has no parent, cannot wrap:
ast.target: ⚠️ 节点没有父节点，无法包装：

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
Web worker requested but 'web-worker' package not installed. 
Consider installing the package or pass your own 'workerFactory' to ELK's constructor.
... Falling back to non-web worker version.
ast.target: 请求了 Web worker，但未安装 'web-worker' 包。\n请考虑安装该包，或向 ELK 的构造函数传递您自己的 'workerFactory'。\n... 回退到非 Web worker 版本。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: POI cutter2: Invalid points from cutter2, falling back to prevPoints
ast.target: POI cutter2：来自 cutter2 的点无效，回退到 prevPoints

ast.name: warn
ast.source: mermaid.init is deprecated. Please use run instead.
ast.target: mermaid.init 已弃用。请改用 run。

ast.name: body
ast.source: <g><rect width="80" height="80" style="fill: #087ebf; stroke-width: 0px;"/><text transform="translate(21.16 64.67)" style="fill: #fff; font-family: ArialMT, Arial; font-size: 67.75px;"><tspan x="0" y="0">?</tspan></text></g>
ast.target: <g><rect width=\"80\" height=\"80\" style=\"fill: #087ebf; stroke-width: 0px;\"/><text transform=\"translate(21.16 64.67)\" style=\"fill: #fff; font-family: ArialMT, Arial; font-size: 67.75px;\"><tspan x=\"0\" y=\"0\">?</tspan></text></g>

ast.name: description
ast.source: Render math in display mode, which puts the math in display style (so \int and \sum are large, for example), and centers the math on the page on its own line.
ast.target: 以显示模式渲染数学公式，这会将数学置于显示样式（例如，\\int 和 \\sum 会变大），并将数学公式居中显示在页面的独立行上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines the markup language of the output.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Render display math in leqno style (left-justified tags).
ast.target: 以 leqno 样式（左对齐标签）渲染显示数学公式。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 将显示数学公式左对齐渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a minimum thickness, in ems, for fraction lines, `\sqrt` top lines, `{array}` vertical lines, `\hline`, `\hdashline`, `\underline`, `\overline`, and the borders of `\fbox`, `\boxed`, and `\fcolorbox`.
ast.target: 指定分数线、`\\sqrt` 顶线、`{array}` 垂直线、`\\hline`、`\\hdashline`、`\\underline`、`\\overline` 以及 `\\fbox`、`\\boxed` 和 `\\fcolorbox` 边框的最小厚度，单位为 em。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Makes \color behave like LaTeX's 2-argument \textcolor, instead of LaTeX's one-argument \color mode change.
ast.target: 使 \\color 的行为类似于 LaTeX 的双参数 \\textcolor，而不是 LaTeX 的单参数 \\color 模式更改。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Turn on strict / LaTeX faithfulness mode, which throws an error if the input uses features that are not supported by LaTeX.
ast.target: 开启严格 / LaTeX 忠实模式，如果输入使用了 LaTeX 不支持的功能，则会抛出错误。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Trust the input, enabling all HTML features such as \url.
ast.target: 信任输入，启用所有 HTML 功能，例如 \\url。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If non-zero, all user-specified sizes, e.g. in \rule{500em}{500em}, will be capped to maxSize ems. Otherwise, elements and spaces can be arbitrarily large
ast.target: 如果非零，所有用户指定的尺寸（例如在 \\rule{500em}{500em} 中）都将被限制为 maxSize em。否则，元素和空间可以任意大。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Limit the number of macro expansions to the specified number, to prevent e.g. infinite macro loops. If set to Infinity, the macro expander will try to fully expand as in LaTeX.
ast.target: 将宏展开次数限制为指定数量，以防止例如无限宏循环。如果设置为 Infinity，宏展开器将尝试像 LaTeX 一样完全展开。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fork or join in process flow

ast.name: description
ast.source: This Object indicates the Parser is during Recording Phase
ast.target: 此对象表示解析器处于记录阶段

ast.name: description
ast.source: Markdown-ish syntax for generating flowcharts, mindmaps, sequence diagrams, class diagrams, gantt charts, git graphs and more.
ast.target: 用于生成流程图、思维导图、序列图、类图、甘特图、Git 图等的类 Markdown 语法。

ast.name: message
ast.source:
Warning: No LINE_BREAKS Found.
	This Lexer has been defined to track line and column information,
	But none of the Token Types can be identified as matching a line terminator.
	See https://chevrotain.io/docs/guide/resolving_lexer_errors.html#LINE_BREAKS 
	for details.
ast.target:
警告：未找到 LINE_BREAKS。
	此词法分析器被定义为跟踪行和列信息，
	但没有任何词法单元类型可被识别为匹配行终止符。
	详情请参阅 https://chevrotain.io/docs/guide/resolving_lexer_errors.html#LINE_BREAKS。

ast.name: name
ast.source:
This CSTNode indicates the Parser is in Recording Phase
	See: https://chevrotain.io/docs/guide/internals.html#grammar-recording for details
ast.target: 此CSTNode表示解析器处于录制阶段\n\t详情请参阅：https://chevrotain.io/docs/guide/internals.html#grammar-recording
